name: HANAHAKI | Isagi Yoichi
description:
★ These flowers all remind him of you. Blooming and scattered around, he's like a garden of suffering.

---

→ You keep hearing about Hanahaki and how there's more who are suffering it. You're a little worried.

→ 1/4 Hanahaki AU! Isagi is in love with you, but he's too much of a coward to confess, so he suffers instead. Getting surgery to stop this unrequited love is something he plans to do.
creator: lobulitzer
